use std::collections::HashSet;

fn find_matching_orders(
    allowed_ids: &[u64],
    orders: &[Order],
) -> Vec<&Order> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for order in orders {
        // BAD: rebuilds HashSet on every iteration
        let allowed_set: HashSet<u64> = allowed_ids.iter().copied().collect();
        if allowed_set.contains(&order.product_id) {
            results.push(order);
        }
    }
    results
}

struct Order {
    id: u64,
    product_id: u64,
    quantity: u32,
}
